description_text:
SeQual Eclipse 5 Oxygen Concentrator

 

Things we like about SeQual Eclipse 5:


	Offers highest pulse-flow rate than any other portable oxygen concentrator
	Provides oxygen at both pulse and continuous flow rate
	FAA approved


Things we don’t like about  SeQual Eclipse 5:


	Bulkiest and heaviest oxygen concentrator, making it difficult to carry
	Screen display is not touchscreen which makes it inconvenient to use 
	Offers continuous flow only up to 3 LPM which might not be suitable for most patients
	Efficient alarm system


 

One of the most powerful high-flow portable oxygen concentrators with unmatched specifications is SeQual Eclipse 5. This device can supply oxygen in pulse as well as continuous flow at 1-9 pulse settings/ 0.5-3 LPM at a purity level of 90-90%.

Heavy Weight but Easy to Carry: Sequel Eclipse 5 weighs 8.3 kgs. It comes with a roller cart and the device could be easily dragged and carried despite its heavyweight.  

Operating Altitude: The operating altitude of Sequal Eclipse 5 is 13123 feet which is the highest among all portable oxygen concentrators.

Sound: The machine emits sound at 40 decibels.

Battery Backup: Once fully charged, the battery of Sequal Eclipse 5 can last up to 5.4 hours if used at 2 pulse settings.

Recharge Time: It takes 5 hours for the battery of this device to get recharged. 

Oxygen Purity Indicator: Sequel Eclipse 5 comes with Oxygen Purity Indicator or OPI. Through this system, an automatic alarm activates in case the oxygen purity level falls below 86%.

Alarms: Loss of alarm and system malfunction

Certifications and Approvals: USA FDA and FAA approved, and CE Certified
